title: Validator Contract (validator.md frontmatter)
description: Machine contract of an independent validation task. The markdown body carries Mission, Method, Verdict format, and Independence rules.

agent.description: Persona in .claude/agents/ that executes this validation. Must never be a producer persona (linted).

parameters.description: Parameters accepted via the manifest's `with` block (e.g. persona, focus, checklist).

verdict_file.description: Verdicts are always written as <validator-id>.verdict.json under validation/attempt-<n>/.
